assertion_results.text: The plan references using entity/src/package_license.rs for the JOIN query rather than writing raw SQL or creating a new entity
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md shows 'use entity::package_license;' and joins via 'package_license::Relation::Package.def()'. reuse-analysis.md Candidate 3 confirms: 'No raw SQL join strings are written. No new struct or migration is created.'

assertion_results.text: The reuse analysis covers all 3 Reuse Candidates from the task description, explaining how each would be applied
assertion_results.evidence: reuse-analysis.md has three detailed sections: Candidate 1 (apply_filter), Candidate 2 (advisory list.rs pattern), Candidate 3 (package_license.rs entity). Each includes 'Purpose of the existing code', 'How it is applied', and 'What is NOT done' subsections.

assertion_results.text: All files listed in the plan are within the scope defined by the task's Files to Modify and Files to Create sections (constraint 5.1)
